companies.name: Strides Pharma Science
recent_news: Strides Pharma Science reported robust export growth in Q1 FY24, driven by strong demand in US and EU markets.
FDA inspections completed positively, paving way for expanded US portfolio in H2 FY24.
key_quotes: Export revenue contributed 78% of total turnover in FY23.
Strong pipeline of ANDA approvals expected to boost 2024–25 exports.
companies.description: Strides Pharma Science is an Indian pharmaceutical company focused on generic drug manufacturing with over 70% of revenue derived from exports to the US, Europe, and other regulated markets.

companies.name: RSWM Limited
recent_news: RSWM reported 18% YoY export growth in Q1 FY24, primarily from textile exports to US and EU.
New manufacturing facility in Gujarat to ramp up capacity for export orders by FY25.
tech_signals: MACD crossing above signal line — Bullish momentum
Volume spike on recent earnings announcement
key_quotes: Exports account for over 65% of total revenue.
Targeting $300M in export revenue by FY25.
companies.description: RSWM Limited is a leading Indian textile manufacturer specializing in yarn and fabric exports, with significant presence in North America and Europe.

companies.name: Cipla Limited
recent_news: Cipla’s US generics business grew 12% YoY in Q1 FY24 with new launches.
Expanded distribution network in Africa and Southeast Asia increased emerging market exports.
tech_signals: Bollinger Bands narrowing — Potential breakout imminent
Volume weighted average price above trendline
key_quotes: Over 55% of total revenue comes from international markets.
Leading Indian pharma exporter to the US and Africa with 11+ manufacturing sites globally.
companies.description: Cipla is a global pharmaceutical company with a strong export footprint, particularly in US generics, respiratory products, and anti-retrovirals for developing markets.

companies.name: Eicher Motors
recent_news: Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield exports surged 31% YoY in Q1 FY24, led by North America and Europe.
New manufacturing partnership announced in Thailand to serve ASEAN markets.
tech_signals: Stochastic RSI above 80 — Overbought, but strong fundamentals support price
key_quotes: Exports contributed 35% of total revenue in FY23; targeting 40% by FY25.
Royal Enfield is the world’s fastest-growing motorcycle brand in the premium segment.
companies.description: Eicher Motors, the maker of Royal Enfield motorcycles, is a leading Indian auto exporter with growing global presence in premium motorcycle markets.

companies.name: Tech Mahindra
recent_news: Tech Mahindra secured $500M+ new IT outsourcing contracts from global clients in Q1 FY24.
Strong demand in North America and Europe for cloud and AI-led digital transformation services.
key_quotes: 95% of revenue generated from international clients.
Top Indian IT exporter with operations in 90+ countries and major clients in Fortune 500.
companies.description: Tech Mahindra is a global IT services company with over 90% of its revenue coming from international clients across North America, Europe, and APAC, primarily in telecom, automotive, and banking sectors.
